original_image_tags: Aged, off-white paper page with three hole-punches at the top edge and some minor staining/foxing. The page appears largely blank except for a blue received stamp at the bottom and handwritten annotations in the margins. The paper shows horizontal fold lines.

elements.description: A blue ink stamp inverted at the bottom of the page containing the text: 'RECEIVED Jul 14 1 36 PM '41 INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUST'.
Handwritten annotations in pencil or ink at the bottom left corner, with some characters resembling '7-14' or similar notes.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual elements (blue stamp and handwritten annotations), but Description B adds specific quoted stamp text not present in Description A without contradicting it.
